name: Create repositories following JFrog naming conventions
name_cn: 按 JFrog 命名规范创建仓库
hint: Run: bash modules/best-practices/create-repo.sh <NICKNAME> — creates local/remote/virtual repos with standard naming: <nickname>-npm-bp-local, <nickname>-npm-bp-remote, <nickname>-npm-bp-virtual
hint_cn: 运行：bash modules/best-practices/create-repo.sh <NICKNAME>，按规范创建 local/remote/virtual 三层仓库

name: Create a Group for team access control
name_cn: 创建 Group 实现团队访问控制
hint: In JFrog UI: Administration → Identity and Access → Groups → New Group. Name it <NICKNAME>-team. Add yourself as a member.
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI：Administration → Identity and Access → Groups → New Group。命名为 <NICKNAME>-team，将自己加为成员

name: Create a Permission Target scoping access to your repositories
name_cn: 创建 Permission Target 为仓库设置访问范围
hint: In JFrog UI: Administration → Identity and Access → Permissions → New Permission. Name it <NICKNAME>-perm. Add your npm repos as resources and assign <NICKNAME>-team with Read+Deploy permissions.
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI：Administration → Identity and Access → Permissions → New Permission。命名为 <NICKNAME>-perm，添加你的 npm 仓库，为 <NICKNAME>-team 配置 Read+Deploy 权限

name: Create a JFrog Project for environment isolation
name_cn: 创建 JFrog Project 实现环境隔离
hint: In JFrog UI: Administration → Projects → New Project. Use your nickname as the project key (lowercase, no hyphens). Add your repos to the project.
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI：Administration → Projects → New Project。项目 key 使用昵称（小写，无连字符）。将你的仓库加入项目

name: Review your governance setup in JFrog UI
name_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中回顾你的治理架构
hint: Review: Artifactory → Repositories (naming), Administration → Groups (team), Administration → Permissions (access scope), Administration → Projects (environment isolation). Document your governance pattern.
hint_cn: 回顾：Artifactory → 仓库命名规范，Administration → Groups 团队访问，Administration → Permissions 权限范围，Administration → Projects 环境隔离
